description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set within a landscaped plot featuring numerous evergreen trees and large boulders. The house has a flat roof with multiple levels and terraces, and its exterior is clad in light brown wood paneling with large glass windows that provide ample natural light. The structure includes a prominent main entrance, several balconies, and an open patio area, with a driveway leading up to the house. The surrounding terrain is landscaped with a mix of trees and rocks, creating a naturalistic, forested environment. The house's design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and wood paneling, surrounded by evergreen trees and boulders in a landscaped setting.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a landscaped area with trees and boulders.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the upper terrace, additional windows, and dense tree coverage near the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage area, and a more open backyard with fewer trees.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the back patio, multiple balconies, and a cluster of trees and rocks along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, small steps, and a covered overhang, integrated into the wood-paneled facade.
